programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Erin Brockovich lands a job as a legal assistant at Ed Masry's law firm. Here, she builds a case against a power company after she learns that they have been polluting a town's water supply.

programme.title: The Pursuit of Happyness
programme.desc: Tired of Chris's professional failures, his wife decides to separate, leaving him financially broke with an unpaid internship in a brokerage firm and his son's custody to deal with.

programme.title: Stepmom
programme.desc: Isabel, a fashion photographer, struggles to endear herself to her divorcee boyfriend's children and his ex-wife Jackie. However, a diagnosis of terminal cancer sparks a change in their relationship.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: When Robert Langdon, a symbologist, learns about the revival of a secret organisation aiming to destroy the Vatican, he immediately joins forces with a scientist to stop the attack.

programme.title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower
programme.desc: Charlie, a 15-year-old introvert, enters high school and is nervous about his new life. When he befriends his seniors, he learns to cope with his friend's suicide and his tumultuous past.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A dying curator of the Louvre hides cryptic clues on Da Vinci paintings. Now it is up to Robert Langdon and Sophie Neveu to follow the clues and unearth a secret kept hidden for centuries.

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: Forrest, a man with low IQ, recounts the early years of his life when he found himself in the middle of key historical events. All he wants now is to be reunited with his childhood sweetheart, Jenny.

programme.desc: In order to learn and master Terastallization, Liko, Roy, and Dot have joined the Naranja Academy's "Tera Training"! They meet Clavell, the school's director, and Geeta, the chairwoman of Paldea's Pokmon League as well as the Elite Four of Paldea: Rika, Poppy, Larry , and Hassel. And so begins their adventure in Paldea Region, setting their sights on their Terastallization debut!

programme.title: Busy Bodies - EP 9
programme.desc: Med and Evie dance off against one another, but there is one problem! B.O. or Body Odour! All that sweating from jumping and moving around has left Med smelling stinky. He's not the only one with a problem though. Aidan has a secret smell he's trying to hide too. It's time for the team to get to the root of what's going on, and why sweating and smelling are critical for our survival!

programme.title: Junior Bake Off S8 - EP 2
programme.desc: The junior version of this global phenomenon returns, hosted by BAFTA-winning comedian Harry Hill. Pastry chef and food writer Ravneet Gill and Bake Off alumnus Liam Charles return to judge the efforts of more budding bakers. It's a mouth-watering journey, as 16 of the country's best young bakers compete. A joyful way of getting children passionate about food.

programme.title: Croc Watch and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall - EP 1
programme.desc: With his trademark adventure-style approach, Steve takes us to South Africa’s Ndumo Game Reserve to explore the dangerous world of hippos and crocs. Remarkable moments include the tagging of a formidable three-meter-long crocodile the unique dietary habits of hippos (and how they cause conflict with local farmers) and how vulnerable these creatures are to climate change.

programme.title: Crimewatch 2026 - EP 2
programme.desc: A baby’s uncontrolled cries lead to a violent assault. Watch how officers from the Criminal Investigation Department work together with GRF officers and IOs from various Land Divisions, as well as forensic experts from the Health Sciences Authority, to expose the offender’s desperate cover-up and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Evolution Earth - EP 4
programme.desc: EVOLUTION EARTH embarks on a global expedition to reveal the extraordinary ways animals are keeping pace with a planet that is changing at superspeed. We meet the scientists, filmmakers and local communities at the front lines of this rapid change. They show that we too can help, and that if we work with nature in planned conservation efforts, nature can do more than survive - it can bounce back.

programme.title: The Intern

programme.desc: Kendra's meeting with Maudy began with an accidental meeting at the Villa, that's where Ken first saw Maudy and immediately fell in love. Initially, Maudy was disturbed by Ken's presence, accidentally the horse that Maudy was riding went berserk until it fell into the river, not long after Ken jumped to save Maudy.

programme.title: Dia Yang Kau Pilih
programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. Maura, Kinara's younger sister, never wants to help and has ambitions to marry a rich man so she can live a luxurious life. Kinara gets a job at Dafa's company. Working together often causes Dafa and Kirana to fall in love. Knowing this, Maura wants to steal Dafa away.

programme.title: Kuwakuwi Aku Gwenchana Tanpamu
programme.desc: Raja, a mischievous young man, got himself into trouble, prompting his grandmother, Omah Lisa, to seize all his assets. In this difficult situation, Raja tried to ask his brother, Farel, for help, but ended up in conflict with him. Amidst the chaos, Putri, a rolled egg seller, accidentally got involved and considered a marriage proposal to help her grandfather.

programme.title: Dia Yang Kau Pilih

programme.title: Jatuh Cinta Sama Kamu Gejala Awalnya Gimana Sih?
programme.desc: Cinta (Ina Marika) and Gema (Hardi Fadhillah) are met because they are accommodating Arka who runs away from home. Seeing Cinta's sincerity and kindness when helping Arka, Gema also felt the same love for Love. So will they be united in a bond of love? Check out the story of her arm in FTV SCTV - Falling in Love with You, What Are the Initial Symptoms?

programme.title: Suka Ngeri Kalo Inget Jagoan Di Hati
programme.desc: Lisa and Yoga both come from humble families. It turns out that Yoga is liked by a beautiful girl named Dita, just as Lisa is liked by a handsome man, which makes Yoga jealous repeatedly.

programme.title: Love Story The Series S3

programme.title: Miss Amis Tapi Manis Bikin Cintaku Ngga Abis-Abis
programme.desc: Famous artist Raisa finds herself inheriting a pond, triggering family conflict, betrayal, and the struggle to manage the family inheritance. With Tama's support, Raisa faces increasingly complex challenges, while Melati creates intrigue for her own personal gain.

programme.desc: Love After Love tells the story of the life of a family that looks perfect but turns out to have a heartbreaking secret. programme.title: The November Man
programme.desc: Peter, a former CIA officer, is assigned the task of protecting a valuable witness, Alice, who has secret information about a Russian presidential candidate.

programme.title: Set Up
programme.desc: After his friend betrays him and disappears with the stolen goods, Sonny seeks vengeance. Subsequently, he partners up with a dangerous mob boss to achieve his goal.

programme.title: Force of Execution
programme.desc: A gangster, who seeks to retire from the life of crime, faces a threat when an upcoming rival challenges his authority. He then decides to take help from a trustworthy former apprentice.

programme.title: Piranha 3D
programme.desc: An earthquake cracks open the bottom of a lake, releasing a prehistoric species of piranha. As sinister events unfold due to the flesh-eating fish, a group of strangers teams up to stop the bloodbath.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: This powerful story of human courage and reconciliation in the face of titanic forces of nature, pits the world's most famous monster against malevolent creatures that threaten man's very existence.

programme.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
programme.desc: When in a post-apocalyptic wasteland, Max, a wanderer, joins the rebel warrior Imperator Furiosa against his will in order to dethrone an autocrat who controls water supply to the land.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: After a genetically altered spider bites him, Peter Parker develops superhuman abilities and confronts a humanoid reptilian creature.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation
programme.desc: The GI Joes are declared traitors by Zartan, with Cobra Commander now having all the world leaders under his control. With nowhere to go, the team turns to its original leader, General Colton.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: Red, Chuck and Bomb have always been the outcasts within a community of flightless birds on an island. But when mysterious green pigs intrude the island, it is up to them to figure out the reason.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Explorer Rick O'Connell and his family face Emperor Han, an ancient Chinese ruler resurrected by a rogue military faction in China via a mystical gemstone.

programme.title: PGA Tour Champions Highlights
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the Hoag Classic - a PGA Tour Champions event held at Newport Beach Country Club. Spain's Miguel Angel Jiménez claimed the win a year ago.

programme.title: Zurich Classic of New Orleans 2021
programme.desc: Catch up on highlights from across four days of action from the Zurich Classic of New Orleans from TPC Louisiana in Avondale. This is the first time the event has been held since 2019.

programme.title: Golf Academy
programme.desc: Professional golfers give advice on how to improve your game across all aspects, from the tee to the green. Here, English star Matthew Fitzpatrick offers some of his top tips.

programme.title: Golf Academy: Jon Rahm
programme.desc: Spanish superstar Jon Rahm joins the Golf Academy to discuss his career and give some helpful tips on improving your game.

programme.title: School of Golf
